---
title: "Little Duke, or, Richard the Fearless, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”, “The Kings of England.”"
---

## Little Duke, or, Richard the Fearless, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”, “The Kings of England.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1854
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John W Parker and Son, West Strand, London

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
